summary: Full-stack developer and automation engineer with hands-on experience building production web and desktop applications, async data pipelines, and self-hosted infrastructure. Combines a background in technical problem solving with a passion for identifying and automating manual processes to drive operational efficiency. Currently focused on backend development and process automation.

experience.description: Progressed through three roles in under two years at a rapidly growing fiber ISP, driving operational automation and team leadership through a cost-first approach

roles.title: Operations Automation Engineer
highlights: Automated technician management and reporting processes using Python, reducing manual work by 50+ hours per week
Integrated with custom legacy OSS/BSS software to streamline routing and automate assignment of installation and repair tickets based on technician availability, location, and skill set
Developed dashboard tools for real-time monitoring of automation processes and job statistics, improving visibility and enabling data-driven decision making

roles.title: Lead Residential Dispatcher
highlights: Hand-selected to build out the Technical Operations team, training 6 new Dispatchers and establishing dispatch procedures
Managed scheduling and dispatches, implementing tools to optimize route planning, completion rate and job costs
Implemented assignment tracking procedures, eliminating missed appointments and improving technician accountability

roles.title: Tech Support Supervisor
highlights: Led a team of ~15 support technicians, reducing average ticket lifespan to 48 hours through targeted training and process improvements
Coordinated with ILECs and third-party vendors to resolve complex technical issues and escalations in a timely manner

experience.description: Progressed from in-store consultation to hands-on automotive technology installation, combining customer-facing sales expertise with technical installation skills

roles.title: AutoTech
highlights: Installed car electronics including stereos, speakers, amplifiers, remote starts, dash cameras, and GPS systems
Diagnosed and resolved complex vehicle electrical issues, ensuring quality installations across a wide range of makes and models
Maintained a high customer satisfaction rating through attention to detail and clean, professional installations

roles.title: Consultation Agent
highlights: Provided expert product consultation to customers on home theater, networking, smart home, and car electronics solutions
Assessed customer needs and designed tailored technology solutions, driving attachment rates and repeat business
Collaborated with installation teams to ensure seamless handoffs from sales to service delivery

education.description: Focused on programming, networking, and systems administration fundamentals.
2/3 completed. Transferred to University of Missouri in Fall 2022.
